title: crotalaria teretifolia
intro: Crotalaria teretifolia is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the narrow-leaf rattlepod or bush rattlepod. The plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria teretifolia include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, including Africa and Asia.
